pokemon:toxel.name: Toxel
pokemon:toxel.summary: It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.
It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.

pokemon:toxtricity.name: Toxtricity
pokemon:toxtricity.summary: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.
When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.
